Sandbox_KNGP_Lore: Spawn with Lore Items (Only applies if Loadouts are active)
Sandbox_KNGP_Lore_tooltip:
Uncheck if you don't want to start with lore items in your inventory.
This includes journals with lore written in them, photographs, and other lore related items.
